name: Boiled Red Potatoes and Baba Ganoush
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes in a pot of boiling water and cook until tender.
2. While the potatoes are cooking, peel the eggplant and finely chop it. Combine with lemon juice, tahini, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and cilantro. Mix well and adjust seasoning as needed.
3. Drain the cooked potatoes and return them to the pan. Add diced red onion and cook over medium-high heat for up to 1 minute.
4. Incorporate the eggplant mixture and toss to warm it through. If necessary, add water to thin the sauce-like consistency.
5. Serve the potatoes on a plate and drizzle with olive oil.
Description:
"A tasty side dish and way to use extra grilled eggplant."
